title: tragacantha glandulifera
intro: Tragacantha glandulifera, also known as Globe Thistle, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its tall stalks and globe-shaped purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha glandulifera include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Globe Thistle can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
